name: Improve WebRTC streaming throughput toward TCP

description: baseline: add autoresearch harness for tcp vs webrtc-direct throughput ratio; benchmark passes at ~0.0600 ratio but checks failed because package-local test script could not find aegir via pnpm filter
baseline: add autoresearch benchmark/check harness and validate current WebRTC Direct throughput ratio at ~0.0653 vs tcp
try resuming WebRTC stream writes at maxBufferedAmount instead of waiting for full drain by setting bufferedAmountLowThreshold to the high-water mark; no improvement on throughput ratio

try flattening each framed WebRTC message into a single RTCDataChannel send call to reduce per-message overhead; crashed during benchmark with libdatachannel reporting DataChannel is closed on bufferedamountlow resume
try using negotiated SCTP maxMessageSize for streams and stop hard-capping WebRTC Direct peer connections at 16KiB; benchmark crashed with WebRTC stream resets during throughput
harness: build @libp2p/webrtc before benchmarking so measurements use current source instead of stale dist artifacts; refreshed valid baseline at ~0.0617 ratio
try matching the documented 16MiB default bufferedAmount cap and resuming writes at the high-water mark instead of full drain; webrtc-direct upload produced no throughput data and stalled
try resuming WebRTC writes when bufferedAmount falls below half the high-water mark to reduce full-drain bursts; throughput ratio regressed
try manually encoding data-only protobuf+length-prefixed frames into a single contiguous buffer so each payload chunk becomes one RTC message; first measurement was slightly below baseline
rerun manual contiguous data-frame encoding to check noise; second measurement was effectively flat vs baseline, so no convincing improvement
tune node-datachannel SCTP defaults on Node by raising send/receive buffer sizes to 4MiB each before creating peer connections; improves webrtc-direct throughput ratio to ~0.0625
add a larger SCTP maxChunksOnQueue on top of 4MiB send/receive buffers; throughput ratio regressed
increase node-datachannel SCTP send/receive buffers further to 8MiB on Node; improves webrtc-direct throughput ratio to ~0.0654
increase node-datachannel SCTP send/receive buffers further to 16MiB on Node; throughput ratio regressed sharply
